name: Moussaka 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggplants and sprinkle with salt. Place in a colander and weigh down with a heavy plate for several hours. Rinse and brush slices with oil, then broil lightly.
2. Sauté beef and onions in 5 tablespoons butter until browned. Add tomato paste, cinnamon, salt, and pepper; mix well.
3. In a greased baking dish, sprinkle bread crumbs on bottom. Alternate layers of vegetables and meat, sprinkling each layer with cheese. Top with vegetables. Dot with 1 tablespoon butter and add water.
4. In a saucepan, melt remaining 6 tablespoons butter. Add flour and cook until mixture begins to brown. Slowly stir in milk, cooking until sauce thickens. Whisk eggs with some of the hot sauce, then stir into remaining sauce.
5. Remove from heat and pour about half the sauce over vegetables. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
6. Return remaining sauce to low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened. Pour sauce over vegetables and sprinkle with cheese.
7. Continue baking until golden brown, about 45-50 more minutes.
